mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_BAT_CFG ( CO_ID, BAT_JB_ID, BAT_JB_NM, BAT_JB_CLSS, BAT_JB_STS_CD, BAT_JB_DESC, CRON_XPR_VAL, CRON_DESC, BAT_JB_NXT_RUN_DT, BAT_JB_LST_RUN_DT, USE_FLG, BAT_JB_PARA, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{batJbId}, #{batJbNm}, #{batJbClss}, #{batJbStsCd}, #{batJbDesc}, #{cronXprVal}, #{cronDesc}, null, null, COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{jobParams, typeHandler=com.clt.hrm.infra.common.typehandler.MapJsonTypeHandler}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE COM_BAT_CFG SET UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId},
BAT_JB_NM = #{batJbNm},
BAT_JB_DESC = #{batJbDesc},
BAT_JB_STS_CD = #{batJbStsCd},
CRON_XPR_VAL = #{cronXprVal},
CRON_DESC = #{cronDesc},
BAT_JB_NXT_RUN_DT = #{batJbNxtRunDt},
USE_FLG = #{useFlg},
BAT_JB_PARA = #{jobParams, typeHandler=com.clt.hrm.infra.common.typehandler.MapJsonTypeHandler}::jsonb,
UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND BAT_JB_ID = #{batJbId}

UPDATE COM_BAT_CFG SET UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId},
BAT_JB_NXT_RUN_DT = #{batJbNxtRunDt},
BAT_JB_LST_RUN_DT = #{batJbEndDt},
BAT_JB_STS_CD = #{batJbStsCd}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND BAT_JB_ID = #{batJbId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'HIS', 6)
INSERT INTO COM_BAT_HIS ( CO_ID, BAT_EXEC_ID, BAT_JB_ID, BAT_JB_STS_CD, BAT_JB_ST_DT, BAT_JB_END_DT, BAT_JB_PARA, BAT_JB_MSG, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_USR_ID, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{batExecId}, #{batJbId}, #{batJbStsCd}, NOW(), NULL, #{batJbPara, typeHandler=com.clt.hrm.infra.common.typehandler.JsonNodeTypeHandler}::jsonb, #{batJbMsg}, #{creUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updUsrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE COM_BAT_HIS SET UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId},
BAT_JB_STS_CD = #{batJbStsCd},
BAT_JB_MSG = #{batJbMsg},
BAT_JB_PARA = #{batJbPara, typeHandler=com.clt.hrm.infra.common.typehandler.JsonNodeTypeHandler},
BAT_JB_END_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND BAT_EXEC_ID = #{batExecId}
